title: Chinese Travel Document Photo
instruction:
Please note:
Currently there are inconsistencies between the travel document requirements and passport requirements in the Consulate App, so the guide line here is a proportional scaling of the passport photo. If it's inaccurate, please leave a message.

guide.title: Center Guide Line
guide.instruction: Align the nose tip to the center line

guide.title: Forbidden Area: Top
guide.instruction: Do not put top of the head/hair into this area

guide.title: Forbidden Area: Bottom
guide.instruction: Do not put bottom of the face/chin into this area

guide.title: Top Head Area
guide.instruction: Put top of the head/hair into this area

guide.title: Draggable Indicator
guide.instruction: Move the rectangle up and down to fit your face

guide.title: Center Square: Left
guide.instruction: Put the edge of the left side of the face (not ear) into this area

guide.title: Center Square: right
guide.instruction: Put the edge of the right side of the face (not ear) into this area

guide.title: Center Square: top
guide.instruction: Put the edge of the top of the head/hair into this area

guide.title: Center Square: bottom
guide.instruction: Put the edge of the bottom of the face/chin into this area
